abilities.description: When launched from a sling, a simple stone becomes deadly. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} by barraging your foe with sling-bullets, mark progress twice on a strong hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} by launching stones at an advancing foe, you may choose one (before rolling).

  • Hold them back: Retain control on a weak hit, but only mark progress once on a strong hit.
  • Hit them hard: Mark progress one on a hit, but @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-1).

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} by preparing stones of a special quality or material, add +1. Then, take +1 momentum or +1 supply on a hit.
